shift.note: Manual execution per capacity-reconciliation design discussed in session (2026-07-13/14): gap-driven headline target (gap/2, uncapped by 15%) reconciled against real per-unit capacity on both sides - sourced worst-CPBL-first from ALL Meta ad sets (Retargeting now eligible), funded best-CPBL-first into Google campaigns confirmed budget-constrained (Search L2 excluded - 0% impression share lost to budget on the 2 most recent days, rank-constrained instead; Search L1/P2 excluded as worse-CPBL than the Meta sources).
